pages.text: A tool's modifier capacity comes from its $(l)binder$() material; armor's from its $(l)plates$():$(br2)- Iron: 2 slots$(br)- Gold: 3 slots$(br)- Netherite: 4 slots$(br)- Bedrock: 5 slots$(br2)Each modifier level spends one slot. Traits granted by materials are $(l)free$() and never spend slots.
pages.title: Slots

pages.text: Combine gear with a modifier item at any $(l)anvil$(). Costs scale per level, and part-way contributions are remembered — you can pay a level's cost across several visits.$(br2)Vanilla enchanted books are refused; smithery gear speaks modifiers.
pages.title: Applying
